markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Address technical accuracy concerns in GrowthX-generated content.](https://fathom.video/share/_1A55wHPnL5_FT9QFz6-C9S2yAg1g5an?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Accuracy Risk:** Rimkus faces significant legal and brand risk from minor technical inaccuracies. The current process, which omits the standard internal peer review, is out of alignment with company policy.](https://fathom.video/share/_1A55wHPnL5_FT9QFz6-C9S2yAg1g5an?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution:** Jennifer will propose adding a technical review step to Vitaly. This requires securing non-billable time from consultants, which may be incentivized by offering them author credit.](https://fathom.video/share/_1A55wHPnL5_FT9QFz6-C9S2yAg1g5an?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
  - [**GrowthX Response:** Matt will investigate improving internal quality control and will help Jennifer make the case to Vitaly by demonstrating GrowthX's commitment to accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/_1A55wHPnL5_FT9QFz6-C9S2yAg1g5an?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: Technical Inaccuracy & Risk

  - [**Trigger:** An author flagged "inaccuracies" in a refreshed "hydrogen embrittlement" article, prompting a review of other content.](https://fathom.video/share/_1A55wHPnL5_FT9QFz6-C9S2yAg1g5an?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [**Findings:** Nora's AI fact-check revealed minor but critical issues (e.g., misstating code requirements), which Rimkus's marketing team cannot catch.](https://fathom.video/share/_1A55wHPnL5_FT9QFz6-C9S2yAg1g5an?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [**Business Risk:** The industry's litigious nature means even minor errors can be used against Rimkus in depositions, threatening its brand and scientific credibility.](https://fathom.video/share/_1A55wHPnL5_FT9QFz6-C9S2yAg1g5an?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [**Process Gap:** The current workflow omits the standard internal peer review required for all other Rimkus-published content, creating a misalignment with company policy.](https://fathom.video/share/_1A55wHPnL5_FT9QFz6-C9S2yAg1g5an?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)

### Proposed Solution: Internal Technical Review

  - [**Proposal:** Jennifer will ask Vitaly to add a technical review step to the workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/_1A55wHPnL5_FT9QFz6-C9S2yAg1g5an?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
  - [**Process:** Articles would be routed through a designated technical leader (e.g., in Energy & Construction) for assignment to a consultant.](https://fathom.video/share/_1A55wHPnL5_FT9QFz6-C9S2yAg1g5an?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
  - [**Incentive:** To secure non-billable time from busy consultants, Jennifer proposed offering them author credit for articles they significantly improve. Matt will confirm this is feasible on GrowthX's side.](https://fathom.video/share/_1A55wHPnL5_FT9QFz6-C9S2yAg1g5an?tab=summary&timestamp=1713.0)

### GrowthX's Response: Process Improvement & Support

  - [**Commitment:** Matt acknowledged the risk and committed to improving GrowthX's internal quality control.](https://fathom.video/share/_1A55wHPnL5_FT9QFz6-C9S2yAg1g5an?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [**Context:** Matt noted the "hydrogen embrittlement" article was an outlier, as it was a refresh of an expert's work. The focus should remain on top-of-funnel, informative content.](https://fathom.video/share/_1A55wHPnL5_FT9QFz6-C9S2yAg1g5an?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [**Support:** Matt offered to speak with Vitaly to help make the case for the new process and demonstrate GrowthX's commitment to accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/_1A55wHPnL5_FT9QFz6-C9S2yAg1g5an?tab=summary&timestamp=1959.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jennifer:**](https://fathom.video/share/_1A55wHPnL5_FT9QFz6-C9S2yAg1g5an?tab=summary&timestamp=1925.0)
      - [Discuss the technical review proposal with Vitaly, Nora, and the designated technical director.](https://fathom.video/share/_1A55wHPnL5_FT9QFz6-C9S2yAg1g5an?tab=summary&timestamp=1938.0)
      - [Update Matt with the outcome by Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/_1A55wHPnL5_FT9QFz6-C9S2yAg1g5an?tab=summary&timestamp=1925.0)
  - [**Matt:**](https://fathom.video/share/_1A55wHPnL5_FT9QFz6-C9S2yAg1g5an?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)
      - [Investigate internal process improvements for technical accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/_1A55wHPnL5_FT9QFz6-C9S2yAg1g5an?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
      - [Confirm if offering author credit to reviewers is feasible.](https://fathom.video/share/_1A55wHPnL5_FT9QFz6-C9S2yAg1g5an?tab=summary&timestamp=1713.0)
      - [Prepare to support Jennifer's discussion with Vitaly.](https://fathom.video/share/_1A55wHPnL5_FT9QFz6-C9S2yAg1g5an?tab=summary&timestamp=1959.0)
